title: The most interesting startups showcased at Google Cloud Next 2026
summary: Google showcased a long list of AI startups at its annual Google Cloud Next conference, highlighting its push to attract AI companies to its cloud platform.
content: Google wants AI startups on its cloud and has showcased a long list of them at its annual conference.

zh.title: Google Cloud Next 2026展示的最有趣的初创公司
zh.summary: 谷歌在其年度Google Cloud Next会议上展示了一系列人工智能初创公司，突出了其吸引AI公司加入其云平台的努力。

title: Duolingo is now giving free users access to advanced learning content
summary: Duolingo is expanding access to its advanced language learning content to free users, previously restricting these features to paying subscribers.
content: Duolingo is opening up its advanced language learning content offering to free users, allowing them to acquire skills that were previously reserved to paid subscribers.

zh.title: Duolingo现在向免费用户提供高级学习内容
zh.summary: Duolingo正在扩展其高级语言学习内容的访问权限，向免费用户开放，这些功能之前仅限于付费用户。

title: Google Maps is about to get a big dose of AI
summary: Google is integrating generative AI capabilities into Maps, bringing advanced AI-powered features to its widely-used mapping platform.
content: Generative AI is being infused into Google's popular feature within Maps.

zh.title: Google Maps即将获得大量AI功能
zh.summary: 谷歌正在将生成式人工智能功能集成到地图中，为其广泛使用的地图平台带来先进的AI驱动功能。

title: Exclusive: Google deepens Thinking Machines Lab ties with new multi-billion-dollar deal
summary: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, significantly expanding its computational capabilities.
content: Mira Murati's Thinking Machines Lab has signed a multi-billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud for AI infrastructure powered by Nvidia's latest GB300 chips, TechCrunch has exclusively learned.

zh.title: 独家：谷歌与Thinking Machines Lab加深关系签署数十亿美元交易
zh.summary: Mira Murati的Thinking Machines Lab与Google Cloud签署数十亿美元交易，获得由英伟达最新GB300芯片驱动的AI基础设施支持，大幅扩展其计算能力。

title: Behind the unraveling of Dan Crenshaw
summary: Rep. Dan Crenshaw, once featured on Time's 100 Next List as a decorated Navy SEAL, faces declining political standing and public controversy in his later career.
content:
In 2019, a 36-year-old Rep. Dan Crenshaw (R-TX), newly elected to Congress, was photographed for the inaugural Time 100 Next List, wearing a dashing eye patch and looking upwards with hope. A Harvard-educated Navy SEAL who'd lost his legs while fighting the Taliban in Afghanistan, Crenshaw was in rarefied company, listed among the magazine's candidates for tomorrow's leaders: musicians like Billie Eilish and Bad Bunny; athletes like Coco Gauff and Alysa Liu; business leaders like Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong; fellow political stars like Pete Buttigieg. 
Crenshaw was, Time declared, "what the Republican Party might look like after Donald Tru …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 丹·克伦肖政治生涯的瓦解
zh.summary: 曾以海豹突击队员身份登上《时代》杂志百大新星榜单的众议员丹·克伦肖，其政治地位日益下滑，晚期职业生涯面临公众争议。

title: Our favorite gear at Sea Otter Classic wasn't the bikes—it was the accessories
summary: Editors at the Sea Otter Classic cycling event highlighted practical accessories like Bluetooth racks and compact tow ropes as standout gear discoveries over the bikes themselves.
content: A Bluetooth suction-cup rack and a palm-sized tow rope were among our most practical finds.

zh.title: 海獭经典赛我们最喜欢的装备不是自行车——而是配件
zh.summary: 海獭经典赛自行车活动的编辑们强调了蓝牙架和紧凑型拖绳等实用配件，认为它们比自行车本身更值得关注。

title: Investors lost billions on Trump’s memecoin. Another gala won’t fix that.
summary: Investors lost billions in Trump's memecoin venture, and additional fundraising events are unlikely to recover losses or prevent potential legal consequences.
content: If Dems take Congress, Trump may face reckoning for “pay-to-play” memecoin galas.

zh.title: 投资者在特朗普迷因币上损失数十亿美元。再办一场募捐活动也无法解决这个问题。
zh.summary: 投资者在特朗普的迷因币风投中损失数十亿美元，额外的募捐活动不太可能弥补损失或防止潜在的法律后果。

title: First vacuums — then the world
summary: Chinese robot vacuum company Dreame invested $10 million in a Super Bowl ad, betting aggressively on becoming a global consumer electronics powerhouse.
content:
Many startups spend years trying to become a household name. Others just spend $10 million on a Super Bowl ad. That's Dreame's bet. The little-known Chinese robot vacuum company has grand ambitions to become a global consumer electronics giant and chose to run a pricey 30-second spot as its opening move. If it works, the ad may be remembered as the beginning of the rise of the next global tech powerhouse. If it doesn't? Well, let's just say Quibi ran a Super Bowl ad, too.

Dreame's CEO wants to be the Chinese Elon Musk

Dreame - pronounced dreamy - used its half-minute of exposure to promise a dizzying product evolution: from robot vacuums a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 先是扫地机器人，再征服世界
zh.summary: 中国扫地机器人公司Dreame投资1000万美元购买超级碗广告，积极押注成为全球消费电子产品巨头。

title: Anker made its own chip to bring AI to all its products
summary: Anker developed its custom Thus processor, a neural-net AI chip designed for audio devices and IoT products that delivers local AI capabilities with lower power consumption.
content:
Anker has announced its own custom silicon that the company says will bring local AI to audio devices, mobile accessories, and IoT devices. The Thus processor is the world's first neural-net compute-in-memory AI audio chip, which is smaller than traditional chips, and requires less power to run complex computations. That makes it an attractive solution for smaller devices. 
When comparing Thus to existing chips, Anker CEO Steven Yang said, "Every AI chip built until now stores the model on one side and does the computation on the other. To think, the device has to carry all those parameters across, many times per second, every single infere …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 安克自主研发芯片，为所有产品赋予AI能力
zh.summary: 安克开发了其定制的Thus处理器，这是一种为音频设备和物联网产品设计的神经网络AI芯片，提供低功耗的本地AI功能。

title: Anthropic’s most dangerous AI model just fell into the wrong hands
summary: Anthropic's Mythos AI model, designed for cybersecurity testing, was accessed by unauthorized users through a contractor's compromised credentials and internet reconnaissance techniques.
content:
Anthropic's Mythos AI model, a powerful cybersecurity tool that the company said could be dangerous in the wrong hands, has been accessed by a "small group of unauthorized users," Bloomberg reports. An unnamed member of the group, identified only as "a third-party contractor for Anthropic," told the publication that members of a private online forum got into Mythos via a mix of tactics, utilizing the contractor's access and "commonly used internet sleuthing tools."
The Claude Mythos Preview is a new general-purpose model that's capable of identifying and exploiting vulnerabilities "in every major operating system and every major web browser …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic最危险的AI模型落入了错误的人手中
zh.summary: Anthropic的Mythos AI模型是为网络安全测试设计的,通过承包商被泄露的凭证和互联网侦察技术被未授权用户访问。

title: Redwood Materials lays off 10% in restructuring to chase energy storage business
summary: Energy storage startup Redwood Materials is laying off 10% of its workforce as part of a restructuring to capitalize on growing demand in the energy storage market. The move reflects the company's strategic pivot to focus on its most promising business segment.
content: The company is restructuring some teams to accommodate a booming energy storage business, according to emails viewed by TechCrunch.

zh.title: 红木材料裁员10%重组，转向储能业务
zh.summary: 储能初创公司红木材料正在裁员10%作为重组的一部分，以抓住储能市场增长的机遇。这一举措反映了该公司战略的转向，专注于最有前景的业务部分。
